title: ctenitis boivinii
intro: Ctenitis boivinii is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly known as the Boivin's ctenitis. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Ctenitis boivinii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and processing the leaves, which can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams for medicinal use.
